title: Accessibility Check
summary: Use this probe page to review generated course materials for accessibility barriers, exclusion risks, and revision needs.

sections.title: Accessible material review
sections.body: Check whether generated materials are readable, usable, inclusive, and appropriate for learners with varied access needs.

sections.title: Review criteria
sections.body: Provide source content, target audience, accessibility expectations, and the kinds of barriers to monitor.

highlights.label: Best for
highlights.value: Material prep, accessibility review, and inclusive course design.

highlights.label: Output shape
highlights.value: Flagged issues, accessibility notes, and revision recommendations.
